meta.title: Consulting for schools | Be Community
meta.description: Education consulting, teacher coaching, community experience and educational marketing for schools in Mexico City Metropolitan Area. More retention and belonging.

hero.kicker: For schools · Mexico City Metropolitan Area
hero.title: A school families
hero.lead: We help schools build loyal educational communities: higher student retention, engaged families and teachers who stay. With method and warmth.

pains.title: Attrition gives no warning. Belonging can't be improvised.

items.title: Students who leave
items.text: Every family that switches schools takes enrollment, reputation and years of relationship with them. Retention is profitability.

items.title: Teachers who turn over
items.text: Teacher turnover breaks pedagogical continuity and the bond with families. Retaining talent means retaining community.

items.title: Little differentiation
items.text: When everyone promises 'educational quality', experience and belonging are what truly set you apart.

items.title: Distant families
items.text: A community that doesn't feel part of something won't recommend, defend or stay. Belonging is designed.

services.title: Four fronts to transform your educational community.

items.title: Personalized education consulting
items.promise: We design value-added experiences that set your school apart.
points: Value propositions that differ from competitors
items.result: A school that stands out for what's lived, not just what's taught.

items.title: Customer experience in community
items.promise: We optimize every touchpoint between the school and its community.
points: Experience map for students and families
AI, virtual communities and business intelligence
Processes that make every family feel part of it
items.result: Loyal communities that recommend and stay.

items.title: Teacher talent coaching
items.promise: Happy teachers build unforgettable educational experiences.
items.result: Less turnover, more commitment and a better climate.

items.title: Differentiated educational marketing

Integration into the Be Community network

method.title: From diagnosis to community, in four steps.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.text: We listen to your community and measure the real experience of students, families and teachers.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: We create tailored strategies based on your school's needs and identity.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.text: We support the rollout with tools, processes and technology.

steps.title: Measurement
steps.text: We track indicators and adjust to sustain results.

items.title: Higher retention
items.text: Less attrition and a more stable enrollment year over year.

items.title: Engaged families
items.text: A community that participates, recommends and defends your school.

items.title: Better teacher climate
items.text: Motivated teams that stay and raise the experience.

items.title: Differentiated brand
items.text: A school recognized for its community and its experience.

items.q: How is Be Community different from a marketing agency?
items.a: We don't just communicate: we redesign your community's entire experience —students, families and teachers— so retention and belonging are real, not just a message.

items.q: Do you work with schools of any size?
items.a: Yes. We adapt the scope to the size and stage of each school, from small institutions to large communities.

items.q: How long does an engagement last?
items.a: It depends on the diagnosis. We design phased plans with clear deliverables and continuous measurement so you see progress within the first weeks.

items.q: Do you serve schools outside Mexico City?
items.a: Our base is in Mexico City Metropolitan Area, but we support schools in other regions both in person and remotely.
With an initial diagnosis. Book a consult and let's talk about your community's needs.

meta.title: Customer Experience consulting | Be Community
meta.description: CX consulting, digital transformation and brand loyalty for companies and SMBs in Mexico City Metropolitan Area. Turn customers into community.

hero.kicker: For companies · Mexico City Metropolitan Area
hero.title: Turn customers
hero.lead: We help companies and SMBs build experiences that create loyalty: customers who come back, recommend and stay. Customer Experience consulting with human warmth.

pains.title: A satisfied customer buys. A customer who belongs, stays.

items.title: Customers who don't return
items.text: Winning a new customer costs far more than keeping one. Loyalty is your most profitable asset.

items.title: Inconsistent experience
items.text: When every touchpoint feels different, the brand loses trust. Consistency builds loyalty.

items.title: Cold processes
items.text: Poorly implemented technology pushes people away. Done right, it makes every interaction feel close.

items.title: Deciding without data
items.text: Without measuring the experience, improving it is guessing. What isn't measured isn't managed.

services.title: Everything you need to build customer loyalty.

items.title: Customer Experience consulting

items.result: Experiences that set your brand apart from competitors.

items.title: Digital transformation

items.title: Community and brand loyalty
items.promise: We turn your customers into a community that recommends you.
items.result: Customers who stay and bring others.

items.title: Business intelligence
items.promise: We measure the experience to make better decisions.
items.result: Decisions based on data, not hunches.

method.title: From friction to loyalty, in four steps.

steps.title: CX diagnosis
steps.text: We measure the current state of your customers' experience and detect friction.

steps.title: Journey design
steps.text: We redesign every touchpoint with a customer focus.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.text: We roll out the digital tools that make the difference.

steps.title: Measure & improve
steps.text: We track indicators and optimize continuously.

items.title: Higher retention
items.text: Customers who return and grow their value over time.

items.title: A recommended brand
items.text: Loyal customers who become your best promoters.

items.title: Efficient processes
items.text: Technology that saves time and improves every interaction.

items.title: Data-driven decisions
items.text: Clear visibility of the experience to improve with certainty.

items.q: What is Customer Experience and why does it matter?
items.a: It's the sum of every perception your customer has when interacting with your brand. A good experience raises retention, referrals and the value of each customer.
Yes. We design solutions tailored to small and medium businesses, with scope and budget matched to your stage.
We work with CRM, chatbots, workspaces and business-intelligence dashboards, always chosen for your real needs.

items.q: Do I need to already have a CRM?
items.a: No. We can start from scratch: we help you choose and implement the right tools for your operation.

items.q: Do you serve companies outside Mexico City?
items.a: Our base is in Mexico City Metropolitan Area and we support companies in other regions both in person and remotely.

meta.title: Privacy Notice | Be Community
meta.description: Be Community's privacy notice under Mexico's Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.lead: Your privacy matters to us. This notice explains, clearly, what data we collect, how we use it and how you can exercise your rights. In compliance with Mexico's Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties and its Regulations, your personal data is protected, used and stored under the terms set out here.

responsable.title: Data controller
responsable.body: Be Community is responsible for processing your personal data and is committed to protecting it in accordance with applicable law.

datos.title: Data we collect
datos.intro: The personal data we may collect includes the following categories:

items.title: Other
items.desc: Any other data necessary for our activities.

finalidades.title: How we use your data
finalidades.intro: Your data will be used for the following purposes:
items: Provide the requested services and products.
Manage the commercial or employment relationship.
Notify you about changes to our products or services.

transferencias.title: Data transfers
transferencias.intro: Your data may be transferred to third parties only in the following cases:
items: When necessary to provide services or fulfill obligations.
When you expressly authorize the transfer.

arco.title: Your ARCO Rights
arco.body: You have the right to Access, Rectify and Cancel your personal data, as well as to Oppose its use. To exercise any of these rights, send your request to the email below, under the terms established by law.

limitacion.title: Limiting use and disclosure
limitacion.body: To limit the use and disclosure of your data, you may request it through the same contact channel.

cambios.title: Changes to this notice
cambios.body: We reserve the right to modify this notice at any time. Any changes will be communicated by publishing them on our website or via email.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.body: For questions, requests or to exercise your rights, contact us:

meta.title: Case studies | Be Community
meta.description: Be Community case studies: schools and companies that transformed their community, retention and experience.

casos.title: Results that stay.
casos.lead: Communities that chose to stay. These are some of the schools and companies we have worked with.
casos.ctaTitle: Want results like these in your community?

items.tagline: From silent attrition to a community that stays.
items.summary: We redesigned the experience of families and teachers to curb attrition and strengthen belonging.
items.challenge: The school lost families every year without fully understanding why, and teacher turnover broke pedagogical continuity and the bond with the community.
items.solutionIntro: We designed a phased plan centered on the whole community's experience:
solution: Assessment of the experience of students, families and teachers.
Redesign of key moments: admission, welcome and follow-up.
An emotional-salary and leadership program for the teaching team.
items.results: Within one school year, retention rose and the teaching climate improved measurably. Families are now more engaged and recommend the school.

quote.text: For the first time, families feel part of the project, not just clients.
quote.author: General Direction

items.tagline: More new families, without competing on price.
items.summary: We repositioned the institute's brand to attract the right families and fill its admissions pipeline.
items.challenge: The institute competed on price and its communication didn't reflect the real value of its educational offering.
items.solutionIntro: We built a differentiated brand and communication strategy:
solution: Definition of the value proposition and brand tone.
Content to position the institute as a reference in its area.
An admissions funnel with follow-up for every interested family.
items.results: The brand stopped competing on price and began attracting families aligned with its offering, increasing new enrollment year over year.

quote.text: Now the families who truly fit us are the ones reaching out.
quote.author: Admissions Office

items.tagline: Customers who bought once now come back.
items.summary: We redesigned a retail brand's customer experience to turn one-time purchases into loyalty.
items.challenge: The brand invested in acquiring new customers, but very few returned after their first purchase.
items.solutionIntro: We mapped and redesigned the full customer journey:
solution: Assessment of CX indicators and friction points.
CRM implementation and warm post-sale communication.
A loyalty program and brand community.
items.results: Repurchase grew steadily and the brand built a base of customers who now actively recommend it.

quote.text: We stopped chasing new customers to take care of the ones who already loved us.
quote.author: Commercial Direction

items.tagline: Cold processes that now feel close.
items.summary: We digitized an SMB's service operation without losing its human warmth.
items.challenge: Customer service was manual, slow and inconsistent, and the team couldn't keep up.
items.solutionIntro: We put technology at the service of the experience:
solution: CRM and automated flows for repetitive tasks.
A chatbot and interactions that resolve without cooling the relationship.
Dashboards to measure and improve continuously.
items.results: The team now serves more and better, with more satisfied customers and processes that scale without losing closeness.

quote.text: Technology took away the tedious work so we could focus on people.
quote.author: Operations
